beats.n_start: {HERO} reaches the foot of the cursed {TOWER} as {OPENING_MOMENT} begins to fall, {GOAL} at its summit dark for a hundred years; four ways lead to the {TOWER} base, {AP1_NAME}, {AP2_NAME}, {AP3_NAME}, and {AP4_NAME}
beats.a_ap1: the causeway stones shift underfoot but hold, and the great {ENTRANCE} looms ahead, half open on darkness
beats.a_ap2: the ivy tears loose in {HERO} grip but a lower window gives onto the entry hall, and {ENTRANCE} stands just within
beats.a_ap3: {AP3_NAME} forks in the dark, one branch sloping up toward {ENTRANCE}, the other dropping into {AP3_DEADEND}
beats.a_ap3_bad: the downward branch ends in a collapsed sump full of black water, and {HERO} must turn back to wait for a safer night to try the climb again
beats.a_ap4: {AP4_NAME} is a trap, its steps hinged over a pit, and {HERO} scrambles back to solid ground as the night thickens, driven off before the climb even starts
beats.b_towergate: inside {ENTRANCE} the air is cold and old; a stair descends into the sound of water while a warmer draught rises from a side arch, and somewhere above {GOAL} waits
beats.b_gate_pod: the warm draught leads to {B_FURNACE}, a dead end, but a maintenance ladder in the corner rejoins the descending stair
beats.c_descent: the stair spirals down worn and green with damp until it opens on the lapping edge of {TIER_U}, the first tier of the climb
beats.h_u: {HERO} wades into {TIER_U} where black water laps the drowned stair and three archways breathe cold air; the first {U_SHARD} is said to rest under the sluice
beats.h_c: {TIER_C} tick and turn, brass automata frozen mid-stride while great gears grind overhead; the {C_SHARD} sits locked in a stalled mechanism
beats.h_l: {TIER_L} climbs into darkness, shelf upon shelf murmuring in dead languages while loose pages drift like moths; the {L_SHARD} is bound inside a locked ledger
beats.h_r: {TIER_R} ring the {TOWER} under a bruised sky, narrow ledges slick with spray and stone gargoyles crouched along {R_BRIDGE} that has half fallen away
beats.h_b: {GOAL} chamber crowns the {TOWER}, its great dark lantern cold at the center while {OPENING_MOMENT} gathers at the glass and the three {SHARD}s hum in {HERO}’s hands
beats.g_u: the {U_GATE} bars the way, its wheel seized with rust and weed; beyond it the {U_SHARD} glints on a submerged plinth
beats.g_c: a {C_GATE} blocks the gallery, teeth locked on a snapped brass key; the {C_SHARD} rides the hub of the wheel just out of reach
beats.g_l: {L_GATE} blocks the ladder to the upper stacks and will not let a climber pass without answering the riddle carved in the reading-desk
beats.g_r: {R_GATE} wakes, a great stone sentinel that steps from the rampart wall to bar the last stair, eyes lit with the old {CURSE}
beats.g_b: the {CURSE} itself rises as {SHADOW} across the lantern, whispering that the night is kinder than the climb and that {HERO} should set the {SHARD}s down
beats.s_u1: the water rises to {HERO} waist as broken lantern-glass drifts past and a current tugs toward a {U_GATE} ahead
beats.s_u2: the sluice grinds open and {HERO} hauls the {U_SHARD} free, one of three, then finds the spiral stair climbing out of the water toward warmer stone
beats.s_c1: {HERO} edges between {C_DIRECT} that sweep the floor in slow bright arcs, timing each step to the ticking of the {TOWER} heart
beats.s_c2: the freed gear turns with a shudder and the {C_SHARD} drops into {HERO} palm, two of three, as a brass stair unfolds toward the next tier
beats.s_l1: the whispers sharpen into half-heard warnings and {L_GATE} unfolds from the stacks, watching {HERO} with inkblot eyes
beats.s_l2: the riddle answered, the ledger falls open and the {L_SHARD} lifts from the page, three of three, while a hidden stair spirals up toward the wind
beats.s_r1: the gale shoves {HERO} against the parapet and {R_BRIDGE} groans, one span still standing over a long dark drop to the clouds below
beats.s_r2: the sentinel outwitted, it grinds back into the wall and the final stair stands open, {GOAL} chamber glowing faintly at the top of the world
beats.s_b1: the {SHARD}s must be set into the lantern {CROWN} in the right order or the {CURSE} will smother the {SPARK}; {GOAL} mechanism waits, patient and dark
beats.s_b2: {HERO} refuses {SHADOW} and fits the three {SHARD}s to the {CROWN}, and the old mechanism drinks the light and begins to warm beneath both hands
beats.s_b2b: {SHARD}s snatched back and clutched tight, {HERO} sprints the last curve of the chamber ahead of {SHADOW} and reaches the {CROWN} from the far side, breath ragged, the housings open and waiting
beats.s_b3: the {CROWN} warms and the first true light in a hundred years gathers under {HERO}’s hands, but {SHADOW} claws at the glass one last time and the order of the final turn must be chosen
beats.b_force: forced too soon {SPARK} leaps wild and throws {HERO} back from the {CROWN}, the {SHARD}s scattering across the floor; {GOAL} stays dark and {OPENING_MOMENT} holds, so the climber must gather the {SHARD}s and steady before trying once more
beats.b_ga1: bargaining, {HERO} offers {SHADOW} a single {SHARD} for safe passage, and it reaches out a smoke-cold hand to take the bargain
beats.b_ga_bad: {SHADOW} takes the {SHARD} and swallows the light with it, and now only two {SHARD}s remain, not enough to wake the {CROWN}; {HERO} retreats down the {TOWER} to seek the lost {SHARD} another night
beats.b_gb1: setting the {SHARD}s blind, {HERO} feels for the housings in the dark and gets two seated true before the third resists
beats.b_gb2: the third {SHARD} jams half-seated and the {CROWN} locks against it, refusing the light until it is cleared; {HERO} must climb down, rest, and come back to seat the {SHARD}s in the light
beats.b_pa1: circling {GOAL} chamber {HERO} finds the old {KEEPER} log open on a lectern, its last page describing the sunwise turn of the {CROWN}
beats.b_pb1: studying {SHADOW}, {HERO} sees it flinches from the {SHARD}s light; there is a moment to strike past it or to keep watching and lose it
beats.b_pb_bad: watching {SHADOW} too long, {HERO} feels the night pour in and the cold take the chamber; the moment passes and the climb must be abandoned to the dark, to be attempted again
beats.b_pc1: in a cold alcove {HERO} finds the last {KEEPER}, only bones and a ring of keys now, one key still fitting the {CROWN} housing
beats.b_pd1: bracing the great doors, {HERO} holds the night out for one long hour and buys the coast a little dawn, but {GOAL} stays dark behind and the true climb is left unfinished for a braver night
beats.b_widder: widdershins the {CROWN} fights back and the gathered light gutters out in a cold rush, {SHADOW} laughing as it fades, and {HERO} is left in the dark chamber having reached the very top yet failing the last turn, to rest and try the final ritual again
beats.e_clever: from the far side {HERO} drives the three {SHARD}s home all at once and the {CROWN} catches with a roar of gold, {GOAL} flaring to life and {SHADOW} torn apart; it is not the {KEEPER} way but it is a lit {TOWER} and an ending to {OPENING_MOMENT}, won by nerve and a clever line
beats.e_relight: sunwise the {CROWN} turns and {GOAL} blazes gold across the whole coast, {OPENING_MOMENT} breaking apart and the {CURSE} unspooling into morning; the {TOWER} stands lit and free, and {HERO} is the {KEEPER} who climbed the whole cursed {TOWER} and brought the light back
beats.u_ga1: the risky bypass climbs outside the barrier along a crumbling ledge of {TIER_U}
beats.u_ga2: the crumbling ledge shears away under {HERO} boot and only a lucky handhold saves the fall, but the bypass is gone and the barrier undefeated, so the tier turns {HERO} back
beats.u_gal: the outer galleries of {TIER_U} spread out in a maze of side passages, each promising a way up and most leading nowhere good
beats.u_gal_c1_p1: passage 1 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c1_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c1_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.u_gal_c1_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c2_p1: passage 2 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c2_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c2_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.u_gal_c2_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c3_p1: passage 3 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c3_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c3_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c4_p1: passage 4 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c4_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c4_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.u_gal_c4_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c5_p1: passage 5 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c5_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c5_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.u_gal_c5_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c6_p1: passage 6 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c6_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c6_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c7_p1: passage 7 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c7_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c7_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.u_gal_c7_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gal_c8_p1: passage 8 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.u_gal_c8_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.u_gal_c8_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.u_gb1: probing the barrier mechanism of {TIER_U}, {HERO} finds a release lever and a tangle of counterweights that could go either way
beats.u_gb_bad: cutting the counterweights drops the whole barrier into a locked position with a boom, sealing the way for good tonight, and {HERO} climbs back down to try again
beats.u_gc_end: there is simply no way around the barrier here, and clinging on grows too dangerous, so {HERO} retreats down a tier to find a safer night
beats.u_gc_p1: the search for another handhold leads {HERO} out onto the raw face of {TIER_U}
beats.u_gc_p2: the holds run out and the wind or water pulls hard at every finger
beats.u_pa1: the flanking passage skirts wide around {TIER_U} and rejoins the way just before the barrier
beats.u_pb1: the side chamber of {TIER_U} is choked with wreckage that {HERO} must clear by hand
beats.u_pb2: past the wreckage two ways open, a narrow crawl back toward the barrier and a sagging floor over open dark
beats.u_pb_bad: the sagging floor gives way and drops {HERO} into a sealed vault below {TIER_U}, the trapdoor slamming shut overhead, and the only choice left is to wait and climb again another night
beats.u_pc1: beyond the near door a corridor of {TIER_U} runs long and lightless, the ceiling dripping
beats.u_pc2: the corridor ends at a choice of two low arches, one breathing cold air, one warm and close
beats.u_pc_bad1: the cold arch opens on a sheer shaft with no floor, and {HERO} backs out just in time, driven down a tier by the near fall and forced to begin the ascent again
beats.u_pc_bad2: the warm arch is a nest of {TOWER} vermin that swarm the light, and {HERO} retreats coughing into the dark, the way lost for tonight
beats.u_pd_end: the low path dead-ends at a caved-in wall with no way through, and {HERO} is turned back from {TIER_U}, the climb halted before it truly began
beats.u_pd_p1: the low path of {TIER_U} slopes down into standing water and colder air
beats.u_pd_p2: the passage narrows until {HERO} must turn sideways between wet stone
beats.u_pd_p3: the ceiling drops lower and the way ahead pinches almost shut
beats.u_pe1: the far gallery of {TIER_U} is quiet, and in a dry alcove {HERO} finds an old climber cache of rope and chalk
beats.u_pe2: rope coiled and hands chalked, the gallery bends back toward the main barrier by a hidden fault in the wall
beats.u_pe_rest: the alcove is warm and safe and the cache is a small mercy, but resting here {HERO} lets the hour slip; the night deepens and {TIER_U} must be left for a stronger attempt

beats.r_ga1: the risky bypass climbs outside the barrier along a crumbling ledge of {TIER_R}
beats.r_ga2: the crumbling ledge shears away under {HERO} boot and only a lucky handhold saves the fall, but the bypass is gone and the barrier undefeated, so the tier turns {HERO} back
beats.r_gal: the outer galleries of {TIER_R} spread out in a maze of side passages, each promising a way up and most leading nowhere good
beats.r_gal_c1_p1: passage 1 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c1_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c1_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.r_gal_c1_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c2_p1: passage 2 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c2_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c2_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.r_gal_c2_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c3_p1: passage 3 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c3_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c3_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c4_p1: passage 4 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c4_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c4_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.r_gal_c4_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c5_p1: passage 5 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c5_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c5_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.r_gal_c5_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c6_p1: passage 6 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c6_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c6_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c7_p1: passage 7 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c7_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c7_p3: the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead
beats.r_gal_c7_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gal_c8_p1: passage 8 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind
beats.r_gal_c8_p2: loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale
beats.r_gal_c8_end: the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night
beats.r_gb1: probing the barrier mechanism of {TIER_R}, {HERO} finds a release lever and a tangle of counterweights that could go either way
beats.r_gb_bad: cutting the counterweights drops the whole barrier into a locked position with a boom, sealing the way for good tonight, and {HERO} climbs back down to try again
beats.r_gc_end: there is simply no way around the barrier here, and clinging on grows too dangerous, so {HERO} retreats down a tier to find a safer night
beats.r_gc_p1: the search for another handhold leads {HERO} out onto the raw face of {TIER_R}
beats.r_gc_p2: the holds run out and the wind or water pulls hard at every finger
beats.r_pa1: the flanking passage skirts wide around {TIER_R} and rejoins the way just before the barrier
beats.r_pb1: the side chamber of {TIER_R} is choked with wreckage that {HERO} must clear by hand
beats.r_pb2: past the wreckage two ways open, a narrow crawl back toward the barrier and a sagging floor over open dark
beats.r_pb_bad: the sagging floor gives way and drops {HERO} into a sealed vault below {TIER_R}, the trapdoor slamming shut overhead, and the only choice left is to wait and climb again another night
beats.r_pc1: beyond the near door a corridor of {TIER_R} runs long and lightless, the ceiling dripping
beats.r_pc2: the corridor ends at a choice of two low arches, one breathing cold air, one warm and close
beats.r_pc_bad1: the cold arch opens on a sheer shaft with no floor, and {HERO} backs out just in time, driven down a tier by the near fall and forced to begin the ascent again
beats.r_pc_bad2: the warm arch is a nest of {TOWER} vermin that swarm the light, and {HERO} retreats coughing into the dark, the way lost for tonight
beats.r_pd_end: the low path dead-ends at a caved-in wall with no way through, and {HERO} is turned back from {TIER_R}, the climb halted before it truly began
beats.r_pd_p1: the low path of {TIER_R} slopes down into standing water and colder air
beats.r_pd_p2: the passage narrows until {HERO} must turn sideways between wet stone
beats.r_pd_p3: the ceiling drops lower and the way ahead pinches almost shut
beats.r_pe1: the far gallery of {TIER_R} is quiet, and in a dry alcove {HERO} finds an old climber cache of rope and chalk
beats.r_pe2: rope coiled and hands chalked, the gallery bends back toward the main barrier by a hidden fault in the wall
beats.r_pe_rest: the alcove is warm and safe and the cache is a small mercy, but resting here {HERO} lets the hour slip; the night deepens and {TIER_R} must be left for a stronger attempt

h_b.c_h_b_5: Brace the doors against the night.

s_b2b.c_s_b2b_1: Set the {SHARD}s from the far side.

s_b3.c_s_b3_1: Turn the {CROWN} sunwise, as the log said.
s_b3.c_s_b3_2: Turn the {CROWN} widdershins, to spite the {CURSE}.

b_ga1.c_b_ga1_1: Snatch the {SHARD} back and run for the {CROWN}.
